title: Tomatoey Gochujang & Sweet Onion Noodles
summary: Soft, silky noodles tossed in a our Gochujang Tomato & Sweet Onion Sauce, finished with a punchy herby sesame topping. Fast, spicy and bloomin' delicious.

method.description: Before you begin, make the Gochujang & Sweet Onion Sauce.
Bring a saucepan of water to the boil. Once boiling, drop in the noodles and cook following pack instructions.
Meanwhile, make the herb salad. Pick the coriander leaves and finely slice the spring onions. Toss both into a bowl with the sesame seeds.

When the noodles are cooked, reserve 100ml of the cooking water, then drain. Tip the noodles back into the pan with the Gochujang Tomato & Sweet Onion Sauce. Set over a low heat and stir to coat, loosening with a splash of the cooking water at a time, if needed.
Stir the rice vinegar through the herb salad.
Divide the noodles between bowls and finish with a generous pile of the herby sesame topping.

tips: Add some crispy tofu or a fried egg on top for extra protein.
Great hot or cold – makes a banging lunchbox option.
Use soba or rice noodles for a gluten-free version.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
